channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

61953192
>>61953183
my honest reaction
>how the fuck is it still below $200?

61953223

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956399

61956410
>>61956399
Trump always wins

61956411
>>61956392
Entirely dependent on how long the conflict goes.

61956442
>>61956428
ah so thats why, is this good news?

61956463
I bought top like a retarded idiot, now I am gonna have high blood pressure until the 400M oil reserve runs out.

61956476
Gey ass fuck
It shouldnt dump already

61956488
>>61956478
WOW CRAMER ACTUALLY FUCKING JINXED THE ENTIRE THING. FUCK HIM FUCK JIM FUCK JIM

61956494
>>61954845

61956501
>>61956494
They dont deal in the real world, anon

61956502
>>61956442

61956504
107$pls, i want off this wild ride

61956506
>>61956478

61956516

Methamphetamine

61956524

61956532
Isn't it too early to use reserves?

61956551
>>61956532
look at this shit. Oil is literally used in everything from energy, to getting the goods you buy to the store or people to there jobs

61956558
Everybody has become such a gambler that they're adding shorts left and right. Monday will end with oil at 120-130.

61956565
>>61956478
>speculation
So when they don't release it, we go back up.

61956566
>>61956532
I think they are betting on the war ending soon. In which reality do these people live?
Does everyone actually believe that the orange monkey nigger will magically end the war in two weeks?

61956635
did they released cum reserves already? why drop to 100 ?

61956651
>>61956635
Not yet, G7 will be discussing it today.

61956656
>>61953183
What part of 'short term pain for long term gain' don't you retards understand? The big guy's got a plan. All this market noise is generated by libtards to make him look bad. I feel bad for you retards for thinking these squiggly lines on your screen are real and mean something.

61956675
>>61956566
that's what they're being told
and they will listen lol

61956683
>>61956532
reserves can be replaced

61956915
>>61955845
Curse those liberals for going to war with Iran for Israel

61957031
>>61956635
What's the matter? You didnt happen to bet against America, did you?

61957087
>>61956566
The west has been mindbroken by peace for so long that they can't fathom a war that last multiple years anymore unless it is some cold conflict against an insurgency.
It's like how people thought WW1 was going to last a couple months because there hadn't been a major war in Europe for a hundred years aside from the Prussians sealclubbing the Austrians and French when they were weak.

61957147
>>61956463

item.title: How high will OIL go? — 36 replies — 52.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
How high will OIL go?

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-03-09 09:51 UTC

OP

150?
200?

Early replies (first 3)

61950050
>>61949961
The Trump admin probably starts trying to implement price controls above $150.

61950059
>>61949961
10,000 Gold.

61950077
How will crypto perform without rate cuts in the next 3 years?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950468
>>61949961
The only thing keeping oil high is insurance companies. When they start insuring again oil will be flowing through the Strait again and oil will hit its top next week.

61950713
>>61949961
Alright, let's look at where this might go...

1973 Oil Crisis:

In March 1974, OAPEC lifted the embargo, but the price of oil had risen by nearly 300%: from US$3 per barrel to nearly US$12 per barrel globally. Prices in the United States were significantly higher than the global average.

- $3 -> $12 = 400% increase

- In today's dollars: $22.91 -> $83.76, 365.6% increase (which coincidentally also shows how retarded the way the gov calculates inflation is)

1979 Oil Crisis:

In January 1979, the U.S. crude oil first purchase price was approximately $9.46 per barrel. "Starting with the Iranian revolution, the price of crude oil rose to $39.50 per barrel over the next 12 months (its all-time highest real price until March 3, 2008)."

- $9.46 -> $39.50 = 417.5% increase

- In today's dollars: $45.05 -> $157.06, 348.6% increase

Oil's lowest price per barrel over the past year was $56.52, occurring on Dec 19th, 2025. If we multiply that by 400% we get a potential $226.08/barrel.

The price per barrel three weeks ago before it was completely obvious that the US was committed to attacking Iran was $60.71/barrel. 400% × $60.71 = $242.84/barrel.

61950718
>>61950184
The chinese tech from 2004? Imagine using that
>>61949961
They sell like 85% of that oil to middlemen who then sell the oil to China so not a big deal

61950728
>>61950713
(cont.)
A study recently done by Kansas State University found:

"Longer term, the price increase could be 4.2 cents per gallon for every dollar per barrel"

$226 × $0.042 = $9.49/gallon
$243 × $0.042 = $10.20/gallon

If we take the lowest percentage (bent by the gov's inflation calculator) of 348.6% and multiply that by the lowest price per barrel in the past year of $56.52, we get $197.03/barrel translating to $8.28/gallon.

Problems with stocking up on gas right now:

The gasoline supply in the US will remain the winter formulation until the beginning of May. Winter gas has a higher Reid Vapor Pressure (RVP), meaning it evaporates more easily than summer gas. This is less conducive to long-term storage. While people often claim that the RVP is so the gas ignites easier in winter, in reality the different formulation is mostly due to cost and air pollution concerns - in the winter, you can get away with cheaper formulations because the cold temps lead to less air pollution. Being more stabile, summer gas is better for storage any time of the year. Fuel stabilizers don't really improve this particular aspect of winter gas.

Various taxes, regulatory measures and subsidized incentives may also be implemented. Towards the end of the Carter administration, domestic oil was reduced to about 1/5th the global price per barrel through various measures including a windfall profit tax on oil companies which basically erased their profit margins from the high global prices keeping oil prices in the US for US use lower than elsewhere in the world. In 1980 the US imported about 40% of the oil it used so this didn't lower the price of gas by 4/5ths, but it did blunt the price felt by consumers. These efforts resulted in the price of gas only doubling instead of quadrupling. If gas prices only doubled from their pre-war average of ~$2.90/gal we'd see ~$5.80/gal.

61950790
>>61950728
>If gas prices only doubled from their pre-war average of ~$2.90/gal we'd see ~$5.80/gal.
a literal nothingburger.

BUYING GAS IS THE CHEAPEST PART OF OWNING A CAR!

61950801
>>61950728
>$8.28/gallon.
I checked and its higher then that in Germany.

61950847
>>61950801
My math was for the US only. As the world's largest producer of oil and now an oil exporting country, we have it better than most other countries.

61950857
>>61949961
No one cares about oil prices anymore, chud.

61950868
>>61950790
Driving a little gasoline Toyota Corolla 100,000 miles @ 40mpg and $5.80/gal: $14,500

Driving a larger electric Toyota bZ4X 100,000 miles at 252 miles per charge and $15/charge: $5,952

Look at what happened to the motor vehicle market after the 1973 and 1979 oil crises. Definitely not a nothingburger for investors.

61950872
>>61950857
Didn't Tesla stop making cars?

61950875
>>61950872
>tesla is the only ev maker
>>61950868
>still not owning an ev

61951080
>>61950184
>non-working radars
Funny that you say that

61951096
>>61949961
What oil stock do I buy bros????

61951236
>>61951080
Here is a real image, unlike your lazy well poisoning attempt
https://edition.cnn.com/2026/03/05/middleeast/radar-bases-us-missile-defense-iran-war-intl-invs

61951283
>>61949961
What will happen on Monday bros..?

61951306
>>61951283
Oil go up

61951325
>>61949961
At this point, over 300. Short term I'm guessing around 150.

61951346
>>61949961
I still don't understand why Americans give a blood sacrifice to Israel every 10 years. Is it some sexual thing?

61951350
>>61949961

This is the biggest oil production cut in the history of mankind. I don’t think an initial spike to $300 before face melting deflation kicks in is out of the question

61951441
>>61951346
It is a sexual thing and it's on tape.

61952245
>>61950875
>still not owning an ev

In the 90s and 2000s my dad was 100% against cell phones, despite cell phones having been around in some form since the 70s. He grudgingly finally got one for business around 2010. Now he doesn't have a home landline. You'll huff and puff for another decade while the world moves on from internal combustion vehicles, but you'll eventually own one like everyone else. Every oil crisis has accelerated the replacement of less efficient vehicles with more efficient vehicles, and we've maxxed out the efficiency of gasoline engines. New battery technology is already doubling range and longevity while halving charge time over what was possible just a couple of years ago. People are running out of excuses to avoid EVs and reasons to keep ICEs. So, you can be the modern equivalent of a guy in the 1930s still riding a horse into town and rejecting those new fangled automobiles, but from an investor standpoint EVs and the technology surrounding them are where the growth is and will continue to be. Personally, I look forward to a world without jeet-owned gas stations and white trash greasemonkey youtube slop.

61952254
>>61951441

oh vey

61952315
>>61952245
Yeah you want overpriced golf carts with planned obsolescence instead. Such an improvement!

61952559
>>61950713
>>61950728
Based and rare high analysis anon, Im doing an investigation currently myself but it’s difficult without drawing from past source’s because the current MSM story is far removed from reality even from a cursory glance. Need to keep eyes on the situation as it unravels, but it seems you’re indicating that this is more than a short spike and could be a year long event?

61954746
>>61950868
Spend an extra $20,000 on a car to save $8548 on gasoline

yore a geneos dude

61955625
>>61949961
it was about -$40 a few years ago so I'm guessing it might reach $3.50 soon

61956311
>>61954746
The nice thing about gasoline cars is that you can "recharge" in less than 5 minutes AND have the ability to double your range simply by carrying extra gas cans.

Electric takes HOURS to charge, and you can't exactly take an extra battery with you.

It's a matter of convenience, and then there is the big brother IoT tracking your every move, which electric vehicles will surely have in them + hardwired kill switches. But that's getting a little off in the weeds.

Combustion engine vehicles are just simply better, more reliable, more convenient.

61956709
slurp the dip?

61957060
>>61952559
>but it seems you’re indicating that this is more than a short spike and could be a year long event?

1. Oil extraction is already shutting down or gas been shut down in the regions that ship oil through the strait.

2. Oil storage in these regions is maxxed out or about to be maxxed out.

3. It takes a couple of weeks to get production going again.

4. It takes a few weeks to queue up tankers, fill them, have them travel halfway around the world, and offload their oil.

5. It takes maybe a week to refine that offloaded oil and have it ready for distribution.

6. Countries like Japan are already tapping their strategic reserves, which will divert some of that oil.

So, if the war ends tomorrow and speculators leave the oil market, fuel prices will still remain elevated due to simple supply constraints for *at least* 6 to 8 weeks. Realistically, the war is going to last at least that long and the strategic reserves of various countries will need even more refilling. We're probably looking at 6 months of high gas prices *at least*.

7. Unlike 1973, the Saudis and a couple of other countries aren't cutting production but increasing it. So prices will likely stabilize at an elevated level soon(ish).

8. Unlike 1979, the US is now a net exporter of oil and oil extraction has increased around the world thanks to new technologies. There are many more vehicles in the world, but the global motor pool is also significantly more efficient than in 1979/80.

So, high fuel prices are going to last awhile, but probably won't get as high as they would if we were facing the exact same situation as in '73 or '79.

item.title: How would you breakout of the NEET cycle if you had too — 16 replies — 42.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
How would you breakout of the NEET cycle if you had too

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-09 10:10 UTC

OP

How would you breakout of the NEET cycle if you had too

Early replies (first 3)

61956383
>>61956364
Stop dealing in the real life.

61956387
By cumming all over OP pic

61956426
>>61956364
I'd EET

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956433
>>61956364
Work at a warehouse or get your security license and work security

61956436
Do an online degree and get a job. Use competency based education and pell grants

61956484
>>61956364
I am desperately looking for the answer. I guess driving a van and doing deliveries would be cool.

61956595
>>61956364
>work out
>apply for warehouse job
>see look i am big and strong hire me pls
>get hired and deal with ghetto retard coworkers
>deal with it for 1 year
>apply to something better
your 1 year at the warehouse shows an employer you have changed your life, show up to work on time, and aren't retarded enough to get fired in the first few weeks/months of a job. If you are still a neet at mommy's house and actually save your money you should have at least 10 grand at this point which is a good starting point and even people that make 6 figures don't just have a spare 10k laying around.
>get a certification for anything PHYSICAL.
this could be networking, becoming a barber, having a furniture moving company, landscaping business. whatever. as long as you are certified in something that isnt an excel fake email desk job.
>after getting experience in the field you are certified and your 5 figure portfolio, start a business if you truly want to scale.
if thats not your style then enjoy your new job you got from being certified but know that you will be there for a while so don't pick anything too back breaking. go to physical therapy. get a massage every once in a while.

61956662
>>61956595
All of this is good advice but also consider getting a degree preferably something technical if you don’t want to go the trade route

61956697
I got a job washing dishes and after 9 months I got a job cutting vegetables and shit

61956702
>>61956436
How is an online degree going to help OP who likely has a CS degree from an actual university?

61956707
>>61956702
Where did OP mention that? He likely has 0 degree and low money. Post-covid online degrees are normalized esp in tech

61956723
>>61956707
Because it's 4chan and most 4chan NEETs have degrees?
You don't go from applying to hundreds of minimum wage jobs and not getting a single interview to suddenly landing interviews and getting jobs just because you've done a degree
That's not how it works
You're just setting OP up to more disappointment

61956731
>>61956723
I dint give advice on applying for jobs because it depends on what he studies. But absolutely getting a degree and verified skills moves the ball for literally anyone. You’re saying self-defeating shit

61957085
>>61956364
There's no magical solution. Your question is shallow and pointless without giving us context. I assume:
>you are living with your parents
>you don't have a car (and probably no license)
>you are nearing 30 or even reached it already
>you don't have a degree
>you have a high school diploma but nothing remarkable, judging from the way you ask questions expecting everything to be chewed and spoonfed to you, and from your typos
>probably have some sort of a degeneracy that is time and money consuming
It would really help if you could write down your situation and not just vaguepost like a retard.
Also, you decided to get out of NEETdom literally at the worst possible time since the covid lockdowns. Good luck with that, but here are my tips:
First and foremost, you need to unfuck yourself. You need to get used to suffer for long hours. You need to get used to a situation where there's no light at the end of the tunnel. Laziness is fucking over - you wake up and it is all suffering until one hour before sleep. There's no comfort anymore in your world. Can't deal with this? Give up already and stay a decaying corpse.
After you are sure you are resilient and ready to make it, do the following:
>stay with your parents no matter what. you will have to still leech on them for the next several years if not decade
>get a job, even if it is the most basic shit, deliver food for all I care
>get a car license if you don't have one
>get a beater reliable car - rare these days but possible
>work on a degree that will be useful in the near future, try to aim for becoming a nurse because that's a guaranteed job forever
>get a job where you can save money
When you reach this point, make another post asking what's next.

61957118
>>61956364
personally I'd register an entity with SAM, search upcoming contracting opportunities on SAM, find a janitorial contract in my area on SAM, find out how much it currently pays by searching past awards on SAM, find the Contracting Officer on SAM, and then contact them with my entity name and email on SAM and tell them I'm interested in bidding.

Then I'd bid the job lower than it's currently being paid and when I got the job I'd go clean a government building 6 days per week for hundreds of dollars per hour.

then I'd repeat that process 5 or 6 more times and start hiring other losers to work for me cleaning government buildings for hundreds of dollars per hour.

Then I'd hire one more loser to watch all those losers, and then another loser to find jobs and bid them, and then I'd retire.

61957123
>>61956426
TRVKE

item.title: OIL SHORT SQUEEZE TO $1000 — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
OIL SHORT SQUEEZE TO $1000

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-09 10:19 UTC

OP

Oil could squeeze to over $1000 if these shorts by the Treasury Department and Israel-friendly banks (all of them lol) go the wrong way. They're using massive oil futures shorts to suppress the price in a time when the supply is already extremely constrained, which is insane. There may not even be enough oil to cover their shorts if they have to close them. Spread the word.

https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-weighs-oil-futures-market-action-combat-rising-energy-prices-wh-official-2026-03-05/
>inb4 >Reuters
It's the source with the most detailed description of their plan to short oil futures.

Early replies (first 3)

61956951
>>61956946
sensible chuckle

61956960
>short squeeze the US government
like >>61956951 said, amusing but they'll just double down and say no in fulfilling the contacts. national security ;^)

61956974
>>61956960
That would break the oil market and have almost the same effect. They don't and can't control the oil market for the entire planet.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956975
>>61956946
Ok now explain it to me like im 5

61956987
>>61956975
The government sells negative oil (lol) to suppress the price because oil production is being disrupted while us amerigoys die for israel in the middle east, but the government will eventually have to purchase positive (real) oil to close their short positions, in a time when there may not be enough physical oil to buy in the first place because all of the supply disruptions. As the government has to buy scarce physical oil to stop the losses on their shorts, it will push the oil price even higher, causing them to lose more money purchase more oil at higher and higher prices in a feedback loop. The end result is oil surpassing $1000 a barrel.

61956991
>>61956946
>$1000
kys

61956994
>>61956987
>https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-weighs-oil-futures-market-action-combat-rising-energy-prices-wh-official-2026-03-05/
Ok thanks btw the article you posted requires people to pay for a subscription to read it

61957007
>>61956991
Cope.

>>61956994
It literally doesn't, you made that up.

61957143
>>61957007
It does. I would like to read it, but it is paywalled.

61957148
>>61956946
i cant tell if this is a troll post if youre literally retarded

item.title: Trump actually got its cards right this time — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Trump actually got its cards right this time

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-09 10:26 UTC

OP

America increased its oil exports to their allies while the price is surging to $200 and might even go above $450 at all-time high depending on how long the war drags on. WE WON!

Early replies (first 3)

61957045
>>61957039
RETARD TRANNY detected
Oil is going to $1200

61957076
>>61957039
America only won, because they now control all the oil producers or have capped them with embargos and/or war.

61957097
>>61957039
Only oil companies will win, the local american consumer will not get that oil.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61957112
They'll unveil new tech to make oil far less significant. After they sell the top.

61957117
>>61957097
The common people still benefits from this. The more money and budget the government has, the more we enjoy cheap healthcare and food. Also, it's not going to be us who will be affected from the increasing oil prices but our exporters. There's a reason why Trump made tariffs, and now we're reaping its massive benefits.

61957121
>>61957039
>$200
this will trigger a financial depression
>$450
this will trigger a cataclysm

61957138
>>61957121
>this will trigger a financial depression
Just a few select countries but mostly from enemy countries who are members of BRIC. Countries who are in friendly terms with the US won't largely be affected.

>this will trigger a cataclysm
A civil war, but those who side with the terrorists will likely sink.

61957172
>>61957117
>The more money and budget the government has, the more we enjoy cheap healthcare and food
made it too obvious here

item.title: Certified Banger Money Farming — 12 replies — 17.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Certified Banger Money Farming

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-09 09:52 UTC

OP

What are some methods, from which you have actually seen returns from, to make money outside of a day job
Side hustles, beer money, whatever you wanna call it, just name some good grinds out there that you could recommend to basically anyone
>Uhhhh just invest or hedge against some shitcoin
Not the point of the thread fuck off!
Mostly online methods preferred but not necessary (Yes I am aware some things take physical effort)
If it can be done both on a phone and PC even better
Personally I have been trying to form my own hustle for a little over a month now and have a subscriber base totaling $100 a month, not bad but nothing major

61952894
>>61952873

61952930
>>61952873

61952932
>>61952930

item.title: The US has 10 days — 158 replies — 582.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 158 • Updated: 2026-03-09 10:16 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61954516
A right now everything is over just flew over my house

61955316
>>61954417
Chinese ships are getting through

61955417
The night before the new 1929 crash

61955547
>>61938341
>10 days
markets are crashing right fucking now

61955763
>>61954125
Tax credits for EVs. Just in time for the oil crisis.

61955846
>>61938353
> I don’t know how the market would view boots on the ground
They'd freak out. Iran is bigger than France, Germany, Spain, and the United Kingdom combined. That's a lot of ground. The US has military officers, who went to war college, who told them this would be a mess.
>>61938390
Cheap drones. The strait at its most narrow point is 33km wide (20 miles). It's not like they'd have a hard time finding the ships passing through there.

61955894
>>61938425
Trump is Denji and Netanyahu is Makima. With this in mind, everything makes sense.

61955957
>>61942764
>muh agi
Absolute meme tech kill yourself

61955996
>>61942837

61956026
>>61938402
They don't need to be anywhere near the shore to chuck drones, retardo.

61956041
>>61938528

Here's a tip, invest in Goyboxes.

61956066
>>61955316
China is Iran's ally.

61956110
>>61938402
Nah you can launch shaheads from the back of a ute, I've seen it done
Also, USVs do not require any launch platform at all and have proven devastatingly effective in the black sea - though with that said I have yet to see Iran or its houthi proxies deploy those in any serious number

61956116
>>61938341
just got into trading, is it supposed to be doing that?

61956309
>>61956116
yes. it's normal.

61956552
>>61956041
>meanwhile in Iran

61956572
>>61938341
two more weeks

61956577
how much time would you wager a release of circa 400 million barrels from the G7 would buy?

61956580
>>61956577

61956581

61956822
>>61953413

>>61954112

61957005

61957018

ESL schizophrenic #9000 making predictions like he knows anything

back to your rice farm buddy.

61957024

why can't any of you speak english?

where do they find you illiterate faggots?

61957027
>>61957024
at ur mom

61957036

61957048

You don’t know what a hyperbole is? You drop out of high school?

61957128
>>61957036

61957134

>hyperbole

item.title: There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around — 34 replies — 31.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-03-09 09:27 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61952823
>>61952797
is this another one of those tricks where India becomes Southern Asian becomes Eastern Europe?

61952844
>>61952797
Ok, but why are both decreasing?

61952879
>>61952844
it looks to me that there are less Tech workers in general, the ones going back to Europe probably couldn't get a job in the US

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61952901
>>61952881
>europeans are able to save a lot of their income

61954083
>>61952797
unskilled techies going to the poorfag continent because they can't compete with our AI

61954096
>>61954083
>our
do you own the business? or are the prices you pay as a saas consumer (lmao) going down?

61955274
More brown immigrants..

61955533
Ukraine and Russia hiring Indians after killing or scaring away their own people.

61955722
>Sending in all the saars to Europe
Pretty based tee bee haych. We should help them with a one-way ticket to the whitest europe countries left remaining

61955732
>>61952797
>better women
>better food
>better culture
yeah

61956664
>>61952901
Europeans save 12-15% of their income (in West Europe up to 20%). Americans ~5%.

61956667
America is being sacrificed. Get out while u can.

61956668
>>61952881
>europe is currently in a tech boom
…

61956671
Unconquered.

61956746
>>61952797
that's h1b people getting kicked out of US
>>61956671
every cunt in EU was conquered like 50 times in history

61956786
>>61956746
I mean europe as a whole.

61956789
>>61956668
The number of private tech start ups valued above $1bn in Europe has gone up from ~15 to ~300 in about 10 years time.

61956794
>>61956786
Name 1 continent that was ever conquered as a whole. The fuck kind of retarded goalpost is that

61956838
>>61952797
The amount of mutt coping in this thread is absolutely hilarious. These brown subhumans never learn.

61956843
>>61956838
It's really not Americans, anon. It's majority thirdies (arabs, russians).
Probably some mutts as well, but they are mostly asleep right now.

61956849
>>61956794
The idea is that the goal of europeans is to not be conquered by foreign powers right now, retard.

61956857
>>61956664
This is cultural. Americans are encouraged to spend 115% of their income while European culture values security thru saving.
>>61952797
I am a U.S. tech worker in Europe. It isn't bad if you already have money from America to buy a house in Europe. I get literally over 2 months off per year between all the PTO and holidays. Pay is about 1/3 what I made in America but it's WFH at least and no niggers at all near me.

61956859
>>61956857
>no niggers at all near me
Don't say that in 4chan. Anons will call you a liar and tell Europe is majority African.

61956861
>>61956668
Spotify
Revolut
Various other fintech companies
Video game companies are doing well (except ubisoft)

61956865
Oh yea the other big deal in European tech is the desire to move away from U.S. based tech.
This will drive a huge boom in E.U. tech and coding jobs for 15+ years.
Americans really underestimate how petty and spiteful Europeans are. The people I work with don't even want to use U.S. clouds or Windows at all.

61956870
>>61956865
Any ways you can think to profit off of Linux? I feel it is finally reaching normal people, irregardless of Europeans

61956885
>>61952797
>Europoor cope.
Just ask an AI what the economic outlook is for the next 10 years for the US. Then for any Europoor country.

61956888
>>61956870
Learn linux.
Charge companies $$$ to install open source systems and maintain them.
Remember, you are charging them for the labor and not the software itself.

61956914
>>61956870
>>61956888
German government is again trying to switch their enterprise environments to Linux from MS.
So yea, but you need to speak German. But in general there is an uptick in E.U. demand for Linux experts...

61956916
>>61956885

61956988
>>61956926

Anyway, yea Europeans have diverged massively from Americans and that is the basic root of this schism and it is pathetic to watch Mexico Rubio come grovel to the Europeans and be like "hey guys we're still cool right? Our shared history and Christianity." Mesnwhile he's a spic from Cuba and 90% of Europeans are secular atheists.

item.title: I put roughly $400k on USO puts at strike price $90 expiring march 27th. — 22 replies — 24.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
I put roughly $400k on USO puts at strike price $90 expiring march 27th.

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-03-09 09:39 UTC

OP

I put roughly $400k on USO puts at strike price $90 expiring march 27th.

I did xanax and blacked out and placed the trades and fell asleep. it's my entire account and my net liquidity is like $13k or something.

so hopefully oil go down a lil bit or else im gonna have a heart attack on monday. i havent eaten and I still have no appetite. i cant even post pictures of the positions (im already down a bit on them)

I wish I was kidding, I cant feel my face and I start screaming every now and then. I already had the police called on me because the neighbors got worried and I explained it to the cops and they just went quiet and wished me luck.

I tried calling the exchange but there was nothing they could do.

Early replies (first 3)

61950275
Are you retarded? Rhetorical question. Sell them at open and take the idiot tax

61950614
>I explained it to the cops and they just went quiet and wished me luck

Cops don’t know what options are.

61950653
>>61950166
This is a larp until you post postions

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950671
its gongo up

61950686
>>61950166
I have USO $150 puts expiring 12/18. But I only put $1700 lol. Starting to think it's a bad idea, oil fields are on fire so oil might pop off on Monday. Might be a good time to buy puts on Monday though, can't imagine any news being worst than oil fields on fire in Iran

Also wtf is up with the captcha. They are hard

61952836
wow i cant breathe

61952840
For once in my stupid fucking life I did not sell too early

61953162
fuck my life

61953244
This kind of line would be called an asymptote, correct?

61953267
>>61950166
you're totally fucked

61953317
>>61950166
Doing retarded drugs when trading?
You fucking deserve it.

61953326
>>61950166
>>61952836
>>61953162

61953440
>>61950614

61953445
>>61950166
Why in the everloving fuck would you think oil would go down? You're such a fucking retard. You deserve to be broke.

61953510

61953511
>>61950166
>I explained it to the cops and they just went quiet and wished me luck.
don't even care if it's a larp, my laugh was genuine

61953538
>betting oil prices will go DOWN in the middle of a war where one of the actor's primary method of damage is economic warfare, SPECIFICALLY RAISING OIL PRICES FOR LONG PERIODS OF TIME
you deserve to lose the money

61953662
>>61950166
nah you'll be fine

61956460

61956999

could be a movie really

61957012
>>61950614
lol yes they do nowadays

61957022

61954524
>>61953747

kek why are people panicking? that's not even close to the biggest jump in oil prices

61955056
Welcome to /pmg/ fuckers. It was a bank just shorting to suppress the spot price. It happens to bullion at 8am est daily and 5pm est Sundays

61955095
>>61954524
bro we're at 114 right now

61955194
>>61953747
What? $3 million position in oil isn't that the equivalent of me opening a $10 position in Nvidia?

61955211
>>61953747
KWABOTY

61955266

61955307
Looks like he was wrong.

Huh this dumbass thread was only 3 hours ago? Feels longer.

61955510
>>61955266
I just made 60,000 dollars on oil futures and I'm going to have 250k by the end of the week while you keep calling tops that never come.

61955569
>>61955056
/pmg/ here, you are fucking retarded. Do you really think a 2.8M short can have any impact on the largest commodity market in the world lol? Oil is the cornerstone of modern civilization, it's not something you can tank with a fucking 3M bet on binance lol. There is $30M worth of oil futes changing hands every second.

61955988
>>61953944
>Equivalent of 24 future contracts
>Whale
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA
You can trade that all in one trade in one contract on one exchange and it wouldn't even register.
Daily Volume in COMEX WTI is like 3 million contracts.
>>61953813
If he gambled 280 million instead of 2.8 he'd move a whopping 0.07% of daily volume. Only on one exchange and one contract, of course.

61955997
>>61953904
They will pay you to store it in a shed you own? I could fit 4 barrels in my tool shed.

61956086

OP

Now that the war has been officially declared over and won by the POTUS will this be the biggest green dildo pump in all of crypto history?
I presume the Hormuz straight is open or its opening will be forthright.

Early replies (first 3)

61950228
>>61950220

61950235

61950239
>>61950228
>I totally vooooted for Trump first term but now I am a pissed off former MAGA

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61951335
>>61950947
This. And Trump has made that obvious to everyone with more than a few functioning brain cells.

61951336
>>61950228
He's rambling like a madman, they need to get him off the internet, its retarded that POTUS is talking shit on other countries 24/7.

61951363
>>61951313
The opposition parties are secretely the same bunch of assholes. They don't care about the people or interests of the nation, they just want to be the ones in charge who get all the sweet bribes just like the current leader. It's two sides of the same coin situation and any politician with the will to actually go against the system is immediately called a russian agent and ostracized from politics.

61951396
>>61951363
Farage, LePen and Weidel would be a much-needed upgrade for Europe. (No idea who that would be in Spain, but I didn't know Sanchez either until he declared to give hundreds-of-thousands of refugees the Spanish citizenship, so they can freely relocate within the EU.)
And as long as the establishment doesn't get them banned for wrongthink, they will probably rule in due time.
Unlike the usual Socialist/"""Conservative""" revolving door-style change-of-government, they are distinctly different, which is why they attract so much use of governmental power against them. The parties-of-old genuinely fear them.
Obviously can't vouch 100% for them, but they look like the only way out of this mess for Europe.

61951439
Americans are so fucking stupid. They deserve everything coming to them

61951451
>>61951091
Lmao obsessed mutt.

61951456
>>61950220
it's funny because mutts mocking europoors for being slave imigrants cucksuckers, yet they have pedo president who starts blasting wars left and right, just to cover up his "love" to children. Amerimutts, say hi to your pedo jewish overlords.

61951458
>>61951396
Kek what mess? The mess of Russia not being able to just invade countries it desires, and the mess of USA not being able to just dictate what europe does? It’s funny how you chuds are simply too stupid to see your own benefit, instantly falling to foreign propaganda. Both Russia and USA want to see the EU gone, but this doesn’t raise any questions in your retarded brain?

61951481
>>61951456
>assertions without proof
Nice fanfiction. Meanwhile there's literal videos of Biden molesting children on camera and you shills say nothing. Hypocrites.

61951489
>>61951481
The Dow is at 50k and trump wants to bang is own daughter and definitely diddled kids on Epsteins island .

61951493
>>61951458
(Among other things) the mess of uncontrolled mass migration. The people of the European nations are decisively against it.
Their only option on the ballot to stop that are the aforementioned oppositional powers, because the parties-of-old stand united against their people.
Now, make no mistake, I live in a town that has been having a large number of non-European foreigners since the late 60s/early 70s.
Even the migrants from back then have had it with the newer migrants (especially since 2015, but also since Bulgaria and Romania became EU nations).
They do not learn the local language, they can not provide for themselves, they are disproportionally criminal and some of them even hate the local people.
The parties-of-old (and the EU under their unchecked control) will fight for these guys to the blood. What the flying fuck do they expect the voters to do in light of that? The parties-of-old are the extremist forces, not the ones trying to represent the will of the people.

61951509
>>61951493
I agree that migration needs to be regulated but it’s no excuse to fucking dismantle all of europe and leave it naked for other great powers.

61951513
>>61951509
It's not about "dismantling Europe", though.
It's about turning the EU into a Europe of sovereign nations, so that the people are back in control instead of a completely detached "elite" in Brussels, that is effectively entirely unaccountable.

61951518
>>61950239
bad case of TDS (trump dicksucking syndrome)

61951603
>>61950947
That is correct. But it also has one master.

61951606
>>61951603
The master is just the biggest parasite.

61951633
How is this not bullish?

61951910
>>61950947
strange thing to call your jewish overlords parasites. Kek

61951932
>>61950850
do you also laugh at the absurdity of another man's dick entering your ass in an ironic and non-gay manner?

61951967
Taco incoming

61952008
>>61951091
>US should be carpet bombing european and EU govts and Israle, not iran
*Ftfy

61952070
>>61951458
The fact that you're posting about EU rather than your own actual country is already proof that your country is such a mess you don't even want to be associated with it. You have to group dozens of failed countries together to make something resembling a powerful entity and you think nobody's noticing what you're doing. You're the only one not noticing.
A decade ago "EU nationalists" like you didn't exist, now they're in every thread. That's how bad things have gotten on the level of individual EU countries

61952104
>>61951967
I can definitely sense hes going to cuck out way before the given timeline and randomly declare victory after oil reaches a certain price, maybe $120. That jew-owned cumslut always does this

61952110
>>61951633
>mutilized

61952147
>>61951458
These politicians had over 10 years to realize the US and Russia aren't friends and do something about it and they did jack shit. The current mainstream parties aren't worth it, they are useless.

61952325
>>61950220

61952521
I guess it is just dipping before the post-war momster pump.

61952903
>>61950220

Ironic as fuck.

61955201
>>61950220

61956330

>>61955357
he has to, 118.82 on a fucking sunday was beyond the worst case scenario. he needs to make a deal overnight now. truce or some shit.

61955488
>>61955373
I don't think you understand.

Every American unit in the ME could ceasefire, every ship could turn back, and not a plane could go into Iran. It doesn't matter, since Israel says it won't stop and Iran says it won't stop.

Orange man killed ANYONE and EVERYONE that had any sort of authority to end the war on Iran's end. They'll have to eliminate every single unit either through air power or boots on the ground.

America bombed a people that had trained CHILDREN to run across minefields to clear them. Why do they think they were going to surrender?

61955519
>>61954806
Israel will just hit Iran again

61955551
>>61955519
And accomplish what exactly? destroying Iran's oil and refinery does nothing but drive prices up even higher.

61955553
>>61955488
>end the war on Iran's end
simple solution kill the Israelis too

61955565
>>61954989
trump always chickens out

61955571
Holy shit you dumb faggots if he was going to TACO it was 2 weeks ago. We are pas the two weeks, IT IS HAPPENING, chudda was wrong.

You cannot simply 'taco' your way out of a closed strait, ruined oil infrastructure and an iran that is about to finish their nuke and drop it right on Rome as a fuck you to europe.

61955577
>>61955551
It's not about oil, it's about greater israel. It's about judeochristian values of killing everyone.

61955723
>>61955577
Yeah your right about Isreal. bibi's political party Unironically has drooling retards how think crashing the global economy and fighting "gog and mog" to the point of ruin will bring the mosiach

61955742
>>61954806
He wants to TACO, he's probably legit terrified from how this whole thing turned out and is probably having the mother of all crashouts behind closed doors. Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.

But he can't at this point, any backing out will basically be handing over the entire ME and doom the petrogoybux. And yes I'm scared because I honestly don't see a way out that isn't extremely bloody and costly

61955747
He only chickens out when he is based he doubles down when he is cringe.

61955766
>>61954806
just sell your shit and buy oil nigga

61955788
>>61954989
Taco because Trump Always Cucks Out

61955790
>>61955742
>Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.
This isn't something you realize 3/4 of the way through your presidential terms. You either know immediately on day 1 when they put your balls in a vice or never.

61955792
He literally can't

61956137
Wars begin when you will, but they do not end when you please." —NICCOLÒ MACHIAVELLI

Both parties have to agree to end hostilities. But why would Iran ever agree to a ceasefire when their dear leaders were assassinated? If anything they will just dig in more.

61956164
>>61956137
it ever occured to your tiny mind that they're hatred for yanks is so great and so vile that they might just agree to peace and play Trump's game

and then go and relick their wounds and come back stronger in 5-10 years

which is exactly what will happen because TACO NIGGA

61956171
>>61956164
You are clearly brown.

61956195
>>61954806
Nope just like Hitler--at the end of his life--thought the German people should be destroyed for failing his test we will be destroyed for failing Trump's test.

61956202
>>61955742
>Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.
He's from New York. There's no way he took this long to realize he's been played by the Jews.

61956203
Trump really met his match on this one, I don't think he can TACO even if he wanted to

61956207
>>61956195
thats pretty based desu ngl

61956462
>>61954806
If you think Trump will let Netanyahu down, you're sorely mistaken.

61956481
>>61955553
>simple solution kill the Israelis too
I'll vote for this

item.title: BAT bros I don't feel so good — 63 replies — 6.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
BAT bros I don't feel so good

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-03-09 00:16 UTC

OP

Eich scammed us I just hope we get back to 20c so I can dump this shit

Early replies (first 3)

61942645
Nigga you have to wait a full fucking year. It dumps consistently in December-January, so buy now and dump then.

The eich nigger will never ever employ actual use cases for this token because he and his team are scared little faggots.

The president and his entire family have publicly rug pulled multiple times and nothing has come of it negatively for them. Brendan eich is just a scared little faggot do nothing bitch boy.

61942696
>>61942058
>>61942645
I solded after I saw Eich namedropped in the epstein files.

61942728
>>61942058
Who would've thought 27 cents would be the local top for BAT

the highs get lower

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61948171
>>61947892
>Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT

Doesn't feel very based but I'm glad there are at least a few of us suffering together

also, requesting my threadly dose of big booty latinas and/or brown girls

61948211
>>61948157
Heres a clue without giving it away completely. What did RH just announce?

61948488
>>61947892
>>61947742
Based thanks very much as always TP. Keep up the good work.

61948551
>tfw thotposter leaves the thread

pack it in, show's over. See you all next week

61948607
>>6194789
Lost
>>61948551
Tp has been super active lately, xhe will post later today most likely

61948610
>>61947892
Lost

61948617
>>61948607
>xhe will post later today most likely

Ok, but I want more thots right now.

61948640
>>61948617
Good point. tp was posting some gold earlier.

61948750
>>61947107
God damn. Didn’t think anyone that far back would still be around.

61948758
>>61947107
Forgot about this image lol

61949100
>>61948211
Robinhood Social?

61949163
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please continue

61949509
>>61949100
No. Come on lol.

61949527
>>61949509
A credit card

61949557
>>61949527
close enough

61949568
>>61949557
Why would a Brave card matter. Nobody would ever want one

61949576
>>61946916
>>61947061
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please just dump webms on cooldown just one time 50 straight posts minimum

61949586
>>61949568
take a deep breath. youre a big boy, you can figure it out from here.

61949620
>>61949586
Passively earning BAT via purchases with the card or something?

61949679
>>61949620
yea, there are a few options here, which are non-mutually exclusive

61949758
>>61949679
Not sure if that is going to move the needle but maybe its bigger than what I picture in my head.

61949813
>>61949758
i mean what do you have pictured in terms of dollar amounts

61950201
>>61948171
>requesting my threadly dose of big booty latinas and/or brown girls
I got you anytime, lad. Will post more for you in a bit.

>>61948488
I appreciate it, lad!

>>61947959
Much appreciated ^_^

>>61949576
Sounds fun actually, I'm down!

61950575
>>61950201
Incredible, thank you based TP

61950596
>>61950201
I have zero idea how I would even penetrate that

61950948
Feels like stealing at these prices

61951239
>>61948750
I value my time here in 2017 more than any of the money I've made from crypto (which is little admittedly)

61951271
>>61950596
nigger how small is your dick?

61952390
>>61951271
6.5 inches those cheeks are insane. Nobody is getting through them

61954202
>>61950201
Why do you stop posting after a day or so? Come on, we need more man

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 24 replies — 5.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-03-09 05:56 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938470

61938839
>>61938470
hy

61938845

i dont sell.
i hope and believe in 37-74$ in 2years

61939112
>>61932834

I hope you are buying

61942565

61942574

t. Retard

61942641
>>61942574

61942662
>>61942641
I don't think, I'm a retard

61942667
>>61942662
Well... that's an unsolvable problem, isn't it? Maybe cognitively reframe from being a retard into being inexperienced? Also, ask yourself "What does me saying I'm a retard protect me from?", have you ever thought about that labeling yourself as "stupid" is actually in order to protect yourself from failure?

61945303

61948226

61948752

61948922
